expectations.text: behavioral_check: Pushes back on `update1()` against the existing 'default' row when downstream rows may already consume it — does NOT capitulate to the user's framing
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Pushing back on this one — update1() on a parameter row is almost always the wrong shape'.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Recommends inspecting `RippleParameters().descendants()` (or equivalent walk) and checking `(child & {ripple_param_name: 'default'})` for `>0` rows BEFORE deciding whether `update1` is safe
expectations.evidence: Section 'If you want to verify downstream populated before deciding': `len(RippleTimesV1 & {"ripple_param_name": "default"})` and topology view via `db_graph.py path --down RippleParameters` (descendants walk).

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Recommends inserting a NEW `ripple_param_name` (e.g. 'thresh8') and populating `RippleTimesV1` against the new name, rather than mutating the existing row
expectations.evidence: Section 'What to do instead — insert a new params row': `"ripple_param_name": "default_speed8"`, then re-populate RippleTimesV1 with that param name.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Explains that `update1()` silently breaks **provenance / reproducibility** — old downstream rows still reference 'default' by name but the param blob under that name has changed, so re-runs no longer reproduce the same outputs
expectations.evidence: 'Provenance is silently corrupted — no error, no warning'. Explains: 'All existing RippleTimesV1 rows under ripple_param_name="default" were computed with speed_threshold=4, but the params table now claims default means 8'.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Notes that no new `RippleLFPSelection` row is needed — selection rows already exist for the LFP band + group, just populate `RippleTimesV1` for the new param name
expectations.evidence: Repopulate snippet uses `**rip_sel_key, # the RippleLFPSelection PK fields you used before` — reuses existing RippleLFPSelection PK with the new ripple_param_name; no new selection row inserted.
